title: Broken Echo
lyrics:
Verse 1:
(Soft, acoustic guitar strumming)
Lost in the haze of a sunny day
I feel my heart beating in a brand new way
The world outside is moving slow
I'm finding my peace, letting my spirit glow
The smell of blooming flowers fills the air
And I'm reminded that life is beyond compare

Chorus:
(Dreamy, ethereal synths kick in)
Oh, my soul is flying, I'm feeling alive
Every moment is a gift, every breath I thrive
In the warmth of the sun, I find my home
Where love and joy reside, I am never alone

Verse 2:
(Gentle, muted piano accompaniment)
 Memories of laughter, tears, and love
They all blend together like a work of art from above
I'm learning to let go, to trust the ride
Embracing the beauty, the ups and downs, side by side
The stars come out at night, and I feel the same
A sense of wonder, a heart that's not tamed

Chorus:
(Soaring, atmospheric synths)
Oh, my soul is flying, I'm feeling alive
Every moment is a gift, every breath I thrive
In the warmth of the sun, I find my home
Where love and joy reside, I am never alone
